context: Initial harness run produced 5 false negatives because the KaTeX Node module looks up `document` as a Node global, while jsdom only exposes `document` on its window. The product code itself (renderer.js) was untouched.
decision: In the harness only, hoist window.document, window, HTMLElement, and Node to globals before evaluating the integrated scripts.
rationale: This is a Node-side test-environment shim with no analogue in the actual browser runtime where the artifact ships. Browsers expose document as a window property already, so the production code is correct as-is.
nested_equivalent: In nested mode, the section-5 builder would document this harness wiring as part of its handoff; Critic would acknowledge it as a test-only shim and not flag the product code.
